event_title: Scale By the Bay CFP extended to June 16!
title: Scale By the Bay CFP extended to June 16!
description: Scale By the Bay, the iconic developer conference in the Bay Area, comes back live and in person for its 10th Anniversary: http://scale.bythebay.io The CFP is extended by June 16, submit your best talk on distributed systems, big data, ETLs, and data pipelines for ML/AI at http://bay.news/cfp
